ValidationRule.description: Forces users to either mark the Ticket as Non Carlyle Asset or attach at least 1 asset to the Ticket
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND( pro_Asset_Validation_On__c = True, pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c != True, pro_Number_Of_Assets_On_Ticket__c = 0 ), AND ( pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c = True, pro_Assets__c = Null, pro_Asset_Validation_On__c = True
) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Tickets must have at least 1 related Asset. In the case of Non Carlyle Asset, the Assets field must be populated.
